title: Backup & Restore
subtitle: System configuration backup. Includes workflows, folders/sharing, machines, credentials, global variables, users and settings — but NOT execution history, audit logs or statistics.

backup.dependencyNote: Hard dependencies (e.g. machines and credentials referenced by workflows) are included automatically.
backup.passphraseHint: At least 12 characters. Without this passphrase the backup is unrecoverable — store it safely.
backup.tooShort: Passphrase must be at least 12 characters.

restore.passphraseHint: Without a passphrase only a structure preview is shown (integrity unverified).
restore.integrityUnverified: Integrity unverified — enter the passphrase for a full check
restore.confirm: Restoring may change or overwrite existing configuration. Continue?
